blended.narrative: Bretton Woods is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
